niche: pressure washing and soft washing service
tagline: Driveways, siding, and patios with their sparkle switched back on.

hero.title: BrightJet pressure washing hero image
hero.alt: A professional pressure washing technician cleaning a residential driveway beside a bright suburban home.

contact.serviceArea: Driveways, patios, siding, fences, and storefronts across the north metro and nearby lake neighborhoods

copy.heroText: BrightJet cleans driveways, siding, patios, fences, and storefronts with smart pressure, soft-wash care, and crews who treat your place like it has company coming.
copy.primaryCta: Text a photo for a quote
copy.introTitle: Fresh curb appeal, no weekend wrestling match.
copy.introText: From algae-streaked siding to driveway mystery stains, we match the cleaning method to the surface so your home looks sharper without getting roughed up.
copy.quoteText: Send a few photos of the surface, the address, and any trouble spots. We will reply with the right method, a clear estimate, and the soonest available clean day.

services.title: Driveways and walks
services.text: Concrete, pavers, steps, and sidewalks cleaned with crisp passes that make the entry feel new again.

services.title: Soft-wash siding
services.text: Low-pressure washing for siding, trim, and gutters where algae and mildew need to leave politely.

services.title: Patios and fences
services.text: Outdoor living spaces, decks, and fence lines freshened up before cookouts, listings, or long-overdue resets.

process.title: Send the photos
process.text: Show us the surface, stains, water access, and anything delicate nearby.

process.title: Pick the method
process.text: We recommend pressure wash, soft wash, or a combo plan with simple pricing.

process.title: Watch it brighten
process.text: We protect plants, rinse thoroughly, and leave the satisfying clean lines behind.

proof.label: options for siding and delicate surfaces
